title: ROMANTICIST 26pcs Extra Thick Stainless Steel Grill Tool Set for Men,Heavy Duty Grilling Accessories Kit for Backyard, BBQ Utensils Gift Set with Meat Thermometer in Aluminum Case for Birthday Black
features: [MUST-HAVE ESSENTIAL BBQ TOOLS]-------Essential starter set for barbecue lover, This grill set contains everything you need for all your BBQs: 1* Long handled tongs, 1*Multi-purpose spatula, 1*Grill fork, 1*Basting brush,1*Cleaning brush with scraper,1*Extra cleaning brush head, 1*Waiter’s corkscrew,4*BBQ skewers, 8*Corn holders,1*Reusable straw sets(2*Rainbow straw,2*Silver straw,1*Straw cleaning brush), 1*Aluminum case

[HIGH QUALITY STAINLESS STEEL]-------Our 26pcs grill tool set made of professional grade stainless steel that rust-resistant, durable and long-lasting, All barbecue tools are extra thick and will hold up well after a lot of use with no bending or cracking, The tongs and spatula are all heavy duty yet light enough to handle with any food on them, Designed with elongated handle to keep safe distance from fire without worrying about getting burned.

[EASY TO CLEAN AND SAFE STORAGE]-------This practical grilling set comes in a decent carrying case, nicely packaged up for easy and safe storing, everything fits tightly in its place, perfect for someone who likes to keep their stuff neat clean and organized, Has everything you need to put on the best barbecue in your backyard, Dishwasher safe after each use and ready to use for the next time, Easy to carry to anywhere at anytime with stylish quality aluminum case.

[PERFECT AND STYLISH GIFT SET]------- You will absolutely love this stainless steel shiny BBQ utensil set upon first glance, Give it as a present to your loved one for Christmas, Father’s day, Birthday, Anniversary or any other special holidays, to see his face lit up the room, Perfect gift set for your grilling parents, spouse, brothers, boyfriend and yourself, Great for camping, picnic, backyard or just for home use

[HASSLE-FREE AFTER SALE SERVICE]-------Your ideal and basic grilling accessories set,Risk-free to choose our professional BBQ tools set. We will offer best customer service and shopping experience for every one of our customers and money-back guarantee for any unsatisfied orders. Do not hesitate to Click the “Add to Cart” button now to start your journey of barbecuing and sharing the moment together with your family and friends.
description: Product Description If you are looking for a complete, quite sturdy set of grilling tools? This is the grilling set you've been looking for! It comes with everything you need! Multi-purpose spatula 4-in-1 spatula with cutting edge design.Can be used for cutting,flipping,bottle opening and tenderizing meat. Stainless steel fork Sharp fork head can fork food easily, and it can also be used to check whether the food is raw or cooked. Kabob skewer Stainless steel barbecue skewers are reusable and heat-resistant.Perfect for grilling. Meat thermometer(-58℉-572℉) Digital meat thermometer will prevent you from over-cooking your meat.
